title: Keo Optimized
description: A lightweight optimization pack with only essential mods, delivering up to 4x higher FPS while keeping Minecraft smooth and stable on Fabric.
body:
![keo optimized logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a21ba1cae5973c5e6cfbd7c406a607c6cc451ae2.png)Boost your FPS up to 3× with this carefully curated Fabric modpack focused exclusively on performance. It includes only the most essential and proven optimization mods — no unnecessary features, no bloat, no extra content. Perfect for low-end PCs, laptops, or anyone who wants buttery-smooth gameplay while keeping the vanilla feel intact.
Expect massive improvements in frame rates, reduced stuttering, faster loading times and better stability, all without sacrificing visual quality or breaking most other mods. Ideal for both survival and modded environments that need extra breathing room.

**with keo optimized**
![with keo optimized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0edae2a51c898d9407e8093a24b2f7960eb2f8c7.png)


**Vanilla**
![without keo optimized (vanilla)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1590cb1da3ddc80e7481cabd6f4e5eb3485a9747.png)
